research_results.title: eBay for Charity | Doing Good Together Through Our Charity Program
research_results.notes: Launched in November 2003 as 'eBay Giving Works', rebranded to 'eBay for Charity' before 2015.

research_results.title: eBay Foundation - eBay Inc.
research_results.notes: Established in 1998 as the first corporate foundation endowed with pre-IPO stock.

research_results.title: Home - The eBay Community
research_results.notes: Launched February 1996 as the Feedback Forum.

research_results.title: SBAN | eBay Main Street
research_results.notes: Government relations and advocacy program for eBay sellers. 100+ members in 26 countries.

research_results.title: Life's easier in the eBay app
research_results.notes: Launched July 10, 2008 as a launch partner for the Apple App Store. Android version launched February 16, 2010.

research_results.title: Motors app
research_results.notes: Launched December 12, 2019. Dedicated app for buying/selling vehicles and automotive parts.

research_results.title: eBay: Mobile - Mobile Web
research_results.notes: Mobile web experience accessible at m.ebay.com. First launched in 2003, redesigned in 2008.

research_results.title: Product research | eBay
research_results.notes: eBay acquired Terapeak in December 2017, made free to all Seller Hub sellers in April 2021.

research_results.title: How to monitor your business in Seller Hub
research_results.notes: Part of Seller Hub Performance tab. Available since Seller Hub launch in 2016.

research_results.title: Seller Hub Reports
research_results.notes: Part of Seller Hub. Available since launch in 2016.

research_results.title: Promoted Listings overview
research_results.notes: Reports accessible via Advertising dashboard in Seller Hub.

research_results.title: Livestream shopping with eBay Live
research_results.notes: Launched June 16, 2022. Real-time livestream shopping experience.

research_results.title: eBay Open: On the Road
research_results.notes: First eBay Open held in 2016 in Las Vegas. Annual seller conference.

research_results.title: eBay Live on Tour
research_results.notes: Launched June 14, 2025. Pop-up livestream shopping events across U.S. cities.

research_results.title: eBay Refurbished | Save up to 50% on quality products
research_results.notes: Four-tier channel brand program launched Nov 9, 2021.

research_results.title: Item condition by category
research_results.notes: Originally standalone program Oct 21, 2020, became premium tier of eBay Refurbished in 2021.

research_results.title: Item condition by category
research_results.notes: Legacy seller-certified condition. Being phased out as of Aug 2025.

research_results.title: Item condition by category
research_results.notes: Standard item condition. Distinct from Certified Open Box program.

research_results.title: Item condition by category
research_results.notes: Legacy product condition. Similar to but separate from Certified Refurbished tier.

research_results.title: eBay Plus
research_results.notes: Subscription program launched in Australia 2015, expanded to Germany 2017.

research_results.title: Top Rated Seller Program | Seller Center
research_results.notes: Enhanced TRS badge. Part of Top-Rated Seller program launched July 2009.

research_results.title: Adding volume pricing to your listing
research_results.notes: Multi-quantity discount feature. Buyers save when purchasing 2+ items.

research_results.title: Subscriptions and fees | Seller Center
research_results.notes: eBay Stores subscription tiers launched June 2001.
